div1.entryFree:
Render, subst. 1) a surrender, a giving up: but mutual r., only me for thee, Sonn. 125, 12. take no stricter r. of me than my all, Cymb. V, 4, 17.
2) account, statement: and send forth us, to make their sorrowed r. Tim. V, 1, 152 (or == the offer of their sorrow?). may drive us to a r. where we have lived, Cymb. IV, 4, 11.
